channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Why today’s youth need more math, logic, and grammar skills
item.description: The Fast Company Impact Council is a private membership community of influential leaders, experts, executives, and entrepreneurs who share their insights with our audience. Members pay annual membership dues for access to peer learning and thought leadership opportunities, events and more.
item.dc:creator: Rodrigo Magnago, Fast Company

item.title: Here are crypto’s biggest heists after Bybit’s $1.5 billion hack
item.description: Cryptocurrency exchange Bybit said last week hackers had stolen digital tokens worth around $1.5 billion, in what researchers called the biggest crypto heist of all time.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Top Apple exec concedes he had doubts about app store fees imposed on alternative payment options
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — Longtime Apple executive Phil Schiller on Monday conceded he initially opposed fees that the iPhone maker charges for in app-transactions processed outside its own payment system because he feared violating a court-ordered mandate designed to create more competition.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Elizabeth Holmes Loses Appeal, Remains in Prison for Theranos Fraud
item.description: A federal appeals court upholds the conviction of Elizabeth Holmes and Ramesh 'Sunny' Balwani, ordering them to pay $452 million in restitution for their roles in the Theranos blood-testing scam.
item.dc:creator: OLGA R. RODRIGUEZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The Evolution of Lore in the Digital Age
item.description: The concept of lore has evolved significantly online, moving beyond its historical roots in teaching and knowledge-sharing to become a term for dramatic and sometimes traumatic details that define a person's identity.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Theranos fraudster Elizabeth Holmes loses her appeal
item.description: Holmes, 40, a Stanford University dropout, was charged in 2018 in connection with $878 million in losses among investors in her startup Theranos.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Baron, The Mercury News

item.title: Apple announces $500 billion investment in US amid tariff threats that could affect the iPhone
item.description: Apple announced Monday that it plans to invest more than $500 billion in the United States over the next four years, including plans to hire 20,000 people and build a new server factory in Texas.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Cómo el despliegue del ERP del Ayuntamiento de Birmingham se convirtió en un fracaso de 48 millones de dólares
item.description: El problemático sistema de planificación de recursos empresariales (ERP) del Ayuntamiento de Birmingham (BCC), basado en el software de Oracle, se ha convertido en un caso de estudio de cómo los proyectos de TI a gran escala pueden salir mal.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Can you spot a credit card skimmer? What to look for
item.description: Before putting your card into a reader, the FBI says there are some easy and effective ways to protect your information.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, NewsNation

item.title: Brazil Supreme Court justice orders Rumble suspension nationwide for alleged non-compliance
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — A Brazilian Supreme Court justice on Friday ordered the suspension of video-sharing platform Rumble in the South American nation for allegedly refusing to comply with court orders.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Sweden is investigating a damaged cable in the Baltic Sea
item.description: STOCKHOLM (AP) — Swedish authorities said on Friday they were investigating a damaged cable that was discovered in the Baltic Sea, the latest in a string of recent incidents of ruptured undersea cables that have heightened fears of Russian sabotage and spying in the region.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Microsoft’s first step to scalable quantum computing
item.description: There’s a race going on. Not the one to build artificial general intelligence, whatever that may be, but to deliver the first at-scale quantum computer that’s able to solve a class of massive problems that would take far too long using even the most powerful supercomputer.
item.dc:creator: Info World
